headline: Lucid Lands $750 Million Lifeline and a New CEO: Is Lucid Stock Poised for a Comeback?
summary: The company is trying to right the ship. Shareholders will have to wait longer to see if it works.

headline: 35,000 Reasons to Hold Lucid Motors Stock Now
summary: Lucid’s transformation into a well-funded autonomous mobility contender is gaining traction, amid a capital boost and a 35,000-vehicle Uber robotaxi deal.

headline: Uber Technologies (UBER) Is Up 9.4% After Committing $10 Billion To Build Global Robotaxi Fleet
summary: Earlier this month, Uber Technologies committed over US$10.00 billion to build out a global robotaxi network, deepening partnerships with Lucid, Rivian, Baidu and others while moving away from its historically asset-light model. This shift toward owning large autonomous fleets could reshape Uber’s cost base, competitive positioning and capital needs across both its Mobility and Delivery ecosystems. We’ll now explore how Uber’s move toward owning thousands of robotaxis could alter its...

headline: Uber Expands Delivery Hero Stake as Prosus Trims Holdings
summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) is included among the Top 10 Reddit Stocks That Will Skyrocket. On April 17, CNBC reported that Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:UBER) agreed to buy an additional 4.5% stake in Delivery Hero from its largest shareholder, Prosus. Prosus said the deal will bring in about 270 million euros, or $318 million. Uber […]
